title: 부천일신중 2학년 영어 1학기 기말 모의고사 3회
subject: 영어

questions.question: 'Mountain hares change colors'에서 'change'의 역할은?
다음 중 정현재 완료 형태가 올바르게 사용된 문장은?
choices: She has knew her since childhood
We have been friends for years
questions.explanation: 'have/has + 과거분사' 형태가 올바릅니다. 'We have been friends for years'가 정확합니다.

questions.question: 'which'를 사용한 관계대명사 문장으로 올바른 것은?
choices: Animals which are big eat more
The book which I read is interesting
The girl which live here is my friend
Students which study hard are smart
questions.explanation: 'which'는 명사나 전체 절을 선행사로 가질 수 있으며, 타동사 다음에 올 수 있습니다. 'which I read'는 정확합니다.

questions.question: 'Amelia told me to try the fish and chips'를 다시 쓰면?
choices: Amelia told me that I try the fish and chips
Amelia said me to try the fish and chips
Amelia asked me trying the fish and chips
Amelia wanted me to try the fish and chips
Amelia instructed me try the fish and chips
questions.explanation: 'tell + 목적어 + to부정사' = 'want + 목적어 + to부정사'로 같은 의미입니다.

questions.question: 'in summer' vs 'in winter'의 표현 중 틀린 것은?
questions.explanation: 'In year'는 틀렸습니다. 'During the year' 또는 'In a year' 또는 'Each year'를 사용해야 합니다.

questions.question: 'They are very stylish animals'에서 'stylish'를 대체할 수 있는 단어는?
'keep them safe from predators'를 다시 쓰면?
다음 중 'make + 목적어 + 형용사' 구조가 올바르게 사용된 것은?
choices: The weather makes the day cold
questions.explanation: 모든 문장이 'make + 목적어 + 형용사' 구조를 올바르게 사용합니다.

questions.question: 'I can't wait to tell'에서 'wait to'의 의미는?
'The flight took 15 hours'에서 'took'가 의미하는 것은?
관계대명사 'which'와 'that'의 차이점으로 올바른 것은?
choices: that은 항상 필수이고 which는 생략 가능하다
questions.explanation: 전치사 뒤에는 which를 사용합니다. 예: 'the book for which'

questions.question: 'I have known her since I was 10'에서 'since'의 역할은?
다음 중 현재 완료의 정의로 가장 올바른 것은?
questions.explanation: 현재 완료는 '과거에 시작해서 현재까지 계속되는 경험이나 상태'를 나타냅니다.

questions.question: 'Mountain hares can hop in deep snow'에서 'can'의 의미는?
'They were like statues'에서 'like'의 의미는?
'Amelia took me to many places'의 수동태는?
choices: I was taken to many places by Amelia
I was took to many places by Amelia
Many places were taken by Amelia to me
Amelia was taken by me to many places
Many places took me by Amelia

questions.question: 'escape from predators'의 의미는?
'This market is known for its food'에서 'be known for'의 의미는?
다음 중 's'나 'es'를 붙이지 않는 3인칭 단수 동사는?
'Tell me about your trip'을 현재 완료로 쓰면?
choices: Tell me about your traveled trip
Tell me about your trip which you have taken
Tell me about your trip that you have been
Tell me what you have seen on your trip
Tell me how you have went on your trip

questions.question: 'I have known her since I was 10'에서 현재 완료가 사용된 이유를 설명하세요.
questions.answer: 과거 10살부터 지금까지 계속 Amelia를 알고 있기 때문에
questions.explanation: 현재 완료는 과거부터 현재까지의 지속된 경험을 나타냅니다.

questions.question: 'which'를 사용하여 다음 문장을 관계대명사로 변환하세요: Some animals are very good at camouflage. These animals live in the wild.
questions.answer: Some animals which live in the wild are very good at camouflage.

questions.question: 'Amelia told me to try the fish and chips'를 'want'를 사용한 문장으로 변환하세요.
questions.answer: Amelia wanted me to try the fish and chips.

questions.question: 'make them nearly invisible'에서 'make'의 역할을 설명하고, 같은 의미의 문장을 만드세요.
questions.answer: 'make'는 목적어를 형용사 상태로 만드는 역할을 합니다. 예: The color keeps them invisible. / The color protects them by making them invisible.

questions.question: 'I can't wait to tell you'와 'I want to tell you'의 의미 차이를 설명하세요.
questions.answer: 'can't wait to tell'은 더 강한 열망과 즉시성을 나타내며, 'want to tell'은 단순한 의도를 나타냅니다.
questions.explanation: 'can't wait to'는 더 강조되고 긍정적인 감정을 표현합니다.

passage:
[Lesson 3] Can You Spot Them?

Can You Spot Them?

Are you good at hide and seek? Some animals which live in the wild are very good at camouflage. You can see them in the air, on land, and in the sea. Their special looks or abilities keep them safe from predators. Let me guide you through the world of animal camouflage.

Mountain Hare

Mountain hares are like rabbits, but they are bigger and have longer legs. They are very stylish animals. Mountain hares change colors according to season. In summer, they turn gray-brown to match the rocks and grass. In winter, they turn white to camouflage themselves in the snow. Changing colors makes them nearly invisible to predators like wild dogs and eagles.

Did you know?
Mountain hares have really big feet. Thanks to them, mountain hares can hop in deep snow and escape from predators.

---

[Lesson 4] See You in London!

See You in London!

Subin's Travel Story

I can't wait to tell you about my trip to London. The flight took 15 hours from Incheon. When I met my friend Amelia at the airport, I was so excited. I have known her since I was 10 years old. She took me to many places in London. Come with me on my amazing trip!

Beautiful Palace

We got on the famous red bus and the first stop was Buckingham Palace. The King and his family live there. We saw the King's Guard. The guards were wearing red jackets and tall black hats. We took pictures near them, but they didn't smile or move. They were like statues!

Yummy Meal

Next, we went to Camden Market. This market is known for its food from around the world. Amelia told me to try the fish and chips. I thought, "How strange! I have eaten fish many times before...
